title: Making A Cup Of Tea With Our Ink
description: Anothr fun project to do with the ink -  To support the Twizy Roadtrip and be rewarded with some 'Working Ink', go to  https://www.indiegogo.com/projects/fwg-powered-by-paper-roadtrip#/ OR to buy materials for your own experiments, go to: http://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/
